name: Fair Housing Act Design Manual

jurisdiction.adopting_body: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)

source_authority: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)

covered_multifamily.label: Covered Multifamily Dwelling (FHA-applicable)
covered_multifamily.description: FHA design requirements apply to covered multifamily dwellings (4+ unit buildings) designed/constructed for first occupancy after March 13, 1991.

rules.label: Accessible Building Entrance on an Accessible Route
rules.notes_template: Verify at least one accessible building entrance on an accessible route from a site arrival point (parking, public transit, public sidewalk).
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(a) – Public/common-use areas must be accessible; an accessible building entrance on an accessible route is required.
rules.remediation: Provide accessible route from site arrival points to a building entrance with ≤ 1:20 running slope, ≤ 1:48 cross slope, ≥ 36 in. clear width.

rules.label: Accessible & Usable Public/Common-Use Areas
rules.notes_template: Verify public and common-use areas (lobbies, mailrooms, laundry, recreation, parking) are accessible and usable.
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(c)(1) – Public and common-use portions of covered multifamily dwellings must be readily accessible to and usable by persons with disabilities.
rules.remediation: Apply ANSI A117.1 / ADA technical to common areas: routes, doors, restrooms, controls.

rules.label: Usable Doors
rules.notes_template: Verify all doors designed to allow passage are sufficiently wide (32 in. nominal clear) for passage by a wheelchair user.
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(c)(2) – All doors designed to allow passage into and within all premises within covered dwellings must be sufficiently wide to allow passage by handicapped persons in wheelchairs.
rules.remediation: Specify 2'-10" or wider doors throughout each covered unit.

rules.label: Accessible Route Into & Through the Dwelling
rules.notes_template: Verify accessible route into and through each covered dwelling unit, with no abrupt level changes > 1/4 in. and limited stepped routes only via §100.205(c)(3) exceptions.
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(c)(3) – Accessible route into and through each covered dwelling unit.
rules.remediation: Eliminate steps within the unit; provide level entry where required by site conditions or use the limited exception.

rules.label: Light Switches, Outlets, Thermostats, Other Environmental Controls in Accessible Locations
rules.notes_template: Verify environmental controls within reach ranges: switches and thermostats 48 in. max AFF, outlets 15 in. min AFF.
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(c)(4) – Light switches, electrical outlets, thermostats, and other environmental controls in accessible locations.
rules.remediation: Coordinate electrical drawings with FHA reach ranges (48 in. max / 15 in. min).

rules.label: Reinforced Walls for Grab Bars
rules.notes_template: Verify reinforcement in bathroom walls to allow later installation of grab bars at toilets, tubs, and showers.
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(c)(5) – Reinforcements in bathroom walls to allow later installation of grab bars.
rules.remediation: Detail blocking on plans at all toilet, tub, and shower locations within each covered unit.

rules.label: Usable Kitchens & Bathrooms
rules.notes_template: Verify kitchens and bathrooms are usable in that an individual in a wheelchair can maneuver about the space (clear floor space, parallel/perpendicular approaches, U-shaped kitchen 60 in. clearance, etc.).
rules.citation: FHA Design Manual / 24 CFR 100.205(c)(6) – Usable kitchens and bathrooms such that an individual in a wheelchair can maneuver about the space.
rules.remediation: Detail kitchen/bathroom clearances per HUD Design Manual; reference ICC A117.1 §1005 (Type B) as a safe harbor.
